description: main study: GPT-5.4-mini direct (within-OpenAI big-vs-small ablation; mirrors Gemini Pro-vs-Flash), reasoning_effort=high (matches V1 GPT-5.1 high-reasoning anchor for within-family apples-to-apples on the deliberation dimension that drove V1 scarring; decision 2026-05-19), scenario=smooth-start (7 games, shortened to 7 games) (Trust-Converge), default settings, 3 LLM agents + 1 dummy. Naming follows asymmetric convention from lesson #15 (Gemini Flash files use _flash_; GPT-5.4-mini files use _mini_).

reasoning_effort_config._comment: 'high' for LLM agents — matches V1 GPT-5.1 high-reasoning anchor (the cell where scarring was observed). Within-OpenAI comparison is now flagship-high (V1 data) vs mini-high (this cell), holding reasoning constant. Pilot run at 'none' (main_gpt5_mini_recovery_20260519_223015) showed no scarring even after CATASTROPHE — switching to 'high' to test whether mini tier scars with adequate deliberation. 'none' for dummy.
